title: 8 people observed a round UFO perform slow and sporadic moves in Recanto das Emas-DF [1996]
excerpt: FEB 15th, 1996. Time: 19h57. Duration: 30 min. text_preview: FEB 15th, 1996. Time: 19h57. Duration: 30 min. In the Recanto das Emas region, Distrito Federal, eight people observed a round white UFO at a high altitude, performing “slow and sporadic” movements for more than half an hour. According to the witnesses, the sighting of the unidentified flying object was carried out with the naked eye and in good weather. The observers did not know how to estimate the distance between them and the sighted UFO, nor did they know how to inform the direction in which it went. summary: Eight people in Recanto das Emas-DF watched a round white UFO performing slow sporadic movements at high altitude for 30 minutes on Feb 15, 1996.
